zh.title: 瑞波币/美元技术分析：震荡偏多延续
zh.content:
短期走势维持震荡上行结构，价格运行在1.13598上方并贴近1.149高点区域，多头仍占据主动，但上涨动能开始趋于放缓，市场进入高位整理阶段，需警惕短线冲高回落风险。

从指标来看，MACD维持小幅正值0.0027，说明多头动能仍在延续但强度有限。均线系统呈现温和上行排列，价格未跌破20日均线，整体趋势仍偏多，但缺乏明显放量突破信号。

支撑位方面，1.135附近为短线关键防守位，其次是1.12区域。阻力位集中在1.149及上方1.16附近，若无法放量突破，行情大概率维持区间震荡格局，等待方向选择。

操作上建议以回调低吸为主，避免追高。若价格回踩1.135并企稳，可轻仓布局多单；若跌破该位置则需谨慎，短线可能转入回撤整理，控制仓位并严格止损。

en.title: Ripple vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
XRP has been trading with a mildly bullish short-term bias, holding above the recent consolidation range around 1.14–1.15. Price at 1.14849 shows buyers attempting to maintain momentum after a gradual recovery from lower levels. Overall structure suggests a mild uptrend but lacking strong breakout confirmation, with intraday candles tightening near resistance. Market participants remain cautious as volume appears moderate and follow-through buying is limited.

Momentum indicators show an early bullish tilt with MACD histogram slightly positive at 0.0027770311, suggesting incremental upward pressure. However, the absence of RSI and signal line data limits confirmation strength, making trend validation partial. Price trading above SMA(20) at 1.13598 reinforces short-term support alignment and indicates buyers currently controlling marginal edge. Overall momentum remains fragile and sensitive to intraday volatility conditions.

Immediate support is anchored around the SMA(20) at 1.13598, which aligns closely with the recent breakout base and acts as the first defensive zone. Psychological support at 1.14 also reinforces this area, while a breakdown could expose 1.12 as the next structural demand. On the upside, price is pressing against 1.149–1.15, where selling pressure has begun to emerge. A breakout above 1.15 could open path toward 1.16 and 1.18.

Short-term bias favors cautious longs while price holds above SMA20, with momentum confirmation still weak. Entries are better considered on dips toward the 1.14–1.136 zone rather than chasing current resistance. Risk management remains essential, with stops below 1.12 to avoid breakdown exposure. Breakout traders may wait for a sustained close above 1.15 before targeting higher extension levels. Volatility may increase during attempts to break resistance in the short term.
